_comment: Registry of the surfaces that carry the single honest SZL Anatomy map. The scheduled sweep (workflows/anatomy-map-drift.yml -> scripts/anatomy_map_drift.py) fetches each surface and asserts the SAME honesty doctrine on all of them: the locked-proven ladder is EXACTLY the canonical_locked 8 {F1,F4,F7,F11,F12,F18,F19,F22}, and the Λ=Conjecture-1 label is present. The two surfaces that embed the byte-shared marker block (extract=marker_block: a11oy + killinchu) are additionally compared capability-for-capability so a one-sided edit to the capability/formula ladder is caught even when the locked-8 + Λ invariants still hold. The HF static Space is a different rendering (extract=invariant_scan over data.js + index.html), so only the locked-8 + Λ invariants are asserted there. Add a new surface by appending here -- no per-surface code. Add a per-surface "ref" only if it tracks a non-main branch.
